name: screen-share-app
description: P2P WebRTC screen-sharing rooms with 1440p@60fps demo streaming

scripts.build: npm -w server run build && npm -w client run build
scripts.test: npm -w server test && npm -w client test
scripts.test:watch: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm -w server run test:watch" "npm -w client run test:watch"
scripts.test:coverage: npm -w server run test:coverage && npm -w client run test:coverage
